description_long: This is a horizontally oriented rectangular banner featuring the word 'MINECRAFT' in large, bold, three-dimensional block letters. The letters are rendered in a gray, stone-like texture with dark outlines, giving a pixelated, digital appearance reminiscent of the Minecraft video game aesthetic. The banner has a flat, thin profile with no visible mounting hardware or support structures. The background is a lighter gray, providing contrast to the darker, shadowed letters. The edges of the banner are clean and straight, with a slight border visible around the perimeter. The overall design is simple yet visually striking, intended to attract attention in an urban or event setting.
description: A flat, rectangular banner with bold, 3D 'MINECRAFT' block letters in gray stone texture on a light gray background. The design is clean, pixelated, and visually prominent.
description_view_0: The back of the banner, showing the mirrored 'MINECRAFT' text in blocky, gray letters.
description_view_1: A thin side profile of the banner, revealing its flat, narrow depth and no visible text.
description_view_2: The front of the banner, displaying the 'MINECRAFT' text in bold, 3D block letters.
description_view_3: The opposite thin side profile, again showing the flatness and lack of visible text.
